name: Italian Rice Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 cups white rice, cooked in 4 cups of water
bread crumbs for coating rice balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except the last two (seasoned bread crumbs and olive oil) to the cooked rice.
2. The mixture should be slightly wet. If it won't form into balls, add more bread crumbs.
3. If the mixture is too dry, add another egg.
4. Form the mixture into balls about the size of meatballs.
5. Roll each ball in additional bread crumbs.
6. Heat a skillet with enough oil to come up 3/4ths of the way of the rice ball.
7. Gently place the bread-crumb-coated rice balls into the hot oil.
8. Cook until well browned on all sides.
9. Serve warm. Makes about 30 rice balls. Optional: Add chopped meat and/or peas to the mixture before forming into balls.
